attributes.description: AWS SQS dashboard for CloudWatch metrics collected by the OpenTelemetry Collector.
attributes.title: [AWS OTel] SQS

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS SQS queues across your infrastructure in real time.
Filter by model at the top. Spot cold starts, errors, and duration outliers in the summary table then click any model to drill down.
To get started, instrument your SQS queues with the Elastic agent.

embeddableConfig.title: Queue count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Count of SQS queues over time, classified per time bucket by state — stale (oldest message > 5 min), backlogged (> 1000 visible), healthy, or idle. A rising stale or backlogged series indicates consumers falling behind.

attributes.title: Queue count over time
attributes.description: Count of SQS queues over time, classified per time bucket by state — stale (oldest message > 5 min), backlogged (> 1000 visible), healthy, or idle. A rising stale or backlogged series indicates consumers falling behind.

query.esql: FROM metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS q_sent = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), q_oldest = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)), q_depth = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE( q_oldest > 300, "stale", q_depth > 1000, "backlogged", q_sent > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS total = COUNT(*), stale = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "stale", backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "backlogged", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS q_sent = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), q_oldest = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)), q_depth = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE( q_oldest > 300, "stale", q_depth > 1000, "backlogged", q_sent > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS total = COUNT(*), stale = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "stale", backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "backlogged", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Queues
embeddableConfig.description: All SQS queues, ranked worst-first by state. Click a queue to drill into its metrics. State reflects the latest values within a 5-minute freshness window. Sent, received, deleted, and empty-receives are totals summed over the selected time range; depth, in-flight, and oldest-message-age are peak (max) values over the range.

query.esql: FROM metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS c_sent = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), c_recv = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesReceived`, NULL)), c_del = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesDeleted`, NULL)), c_empty = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfEmptyReceives`, NULL)), c_depth = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)), c_inflight = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible`, NULL)), c_oldest = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)), c_account = MAX(cloud.account.id), c_region = MAX(cloud.region) BY QueueName, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_oldest > 300, 1, c_depth > 1000, 2, c_sent > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_oldest > 300, "stale", c_depth > 1000, "backlogged", c_sent > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

FROM metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS c_sent = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), c_recv = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesReceived`, NULL)), c_del = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesDeleted`, NULL)), c_empty = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfEmptyReceives`, NULL)), c_depth = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)), c_inflight = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible`, NULL)), c_oldest = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)), c_account = MAX(cloud.account.id), c_region = MAX(cloud.region) BY QueueName, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_oldest > 300, 1, c_depth > 1000, 2, c_sent > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_oldest > 300, "stale", c_depth > 1000, "backlogged", c_sent > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

query.esql: FROM metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(@timestamp) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", @timestamp, latest_global) <= 5 | STATS sent_cur = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), oldest_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)), depth_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)) BY QueueName, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE(oldest_cur > 300, "stale", depth_cur > 1000, "backlogged", sent_cur > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS queues = COUNT(*) BY sqs_state = state

FROM metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(@timestamp) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", @timestamp, latest_global) <= 5 | STATS sent_cur = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), oldest_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)), depth_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)) BY QueueName, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE(oldest_cur > 300, "stale", depth_cur > 1000, "backlogged", sent_cur > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS queues = COUNT(*) BY sqs_state = state

embeddableConfig.title: SQS queues — hexagon map (click an hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per SQS queue, ordered worst-first with stale or backlogged queues first. Toggle Color by between Status, Oldest Message Age, or Queue Depth; metric views support Min, Max, Avg, and Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that queue.

 AND QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum", "Sum") | STATS age_min = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,

embeddableConfig.title: Messages sent
embeddableConfig.description: Messages sent per queue over time — summed per bucket. Top 10 queues by messages sent per bucket.

attributes.title: Messages sent
attributes.description: Messages sent per queue over time — summed per bucket. Top 10 queues by messages sent per bucket.

query.esql: TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS sent = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region | WHERE sent IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, sent DESC, QueueName ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
